summary: Comprehensive testing of Floarea.ae luxury flower shop app completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). All Shopify API integrations working correctly with real product data. Frontend: All core features functional - home screen, shop with search/filters, product detail, cart, wishlist, profile, and tab navigation working. Fixed duplicate React keys warning. One minor issue remains: product images not loading on detail page.

issues: Product images showing gray placeholder instead of actual images on product detail page
Images load correctly on home screen and cart, but fail on product detail page

action_items: Investigate product image loading issue on product detail page - images work on home/cart but show gray placeholder on detail page (possible Shopify image URL issue or expo-image loading problem)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All backend APIs working correctly with real Shopify Storefront API data
✅ Auth system working: JWT tokens, bcrypt password hashing, admin user seeded
✅ Cart creation returns real Shopify checkout URLs pointing to floarea.ae
✅ Products have correct structure: price in AED, variant_id, images array
✅ Mobile-first design with proper React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ Tab navigation working (Home, Shop, Cart, Wishlist, Profile)
✅ WhatsApp FAB button visible and functional (testID: whatsapp-contact)
✅ FIXED: Duplicate keys in FlatList - shop.tsx line 71 now uses unique key 'filter-all'
⚠️ Product images not loading on detail page - needs investigation
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. App uses real Shopify Storefront API data. Admin user auto-seeded on backend startup: admin@floarea.ae / admin123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working with real Shopify data. Frontend fully functional with one minor UI issue (image loading on product detail). Cart successfully adds items and checkout button works. Auth screens present but not tested (would require actual registration/login flow). WhatsApp button confirmed visible with testID='whatsapp-contact'. Duplicate keys warning fixed in shop.tsx.

products.all_products: ✅ Real Shopify products with AED prices, variant_id, images

frontend_test_details.home_screen: ✅ Hero banner, categories, products, WhatsApp FAB all visible
frontend_test_details.shop_tab: ✅ Search input, filter chips, product grid working. Duplicate keys warning FIXED
frontend_test_details.product_detail: ✅ Back button, add to cart, quantity controls working. ⚠️ Images showing gray placeholder
frontend_test_details.cart_tab: ✅ Items display correctly (200 ROSES & ORCHID BOUQUET - Dhs. 1,800), quantity controls, checkout button visible
frontend_test_details.profile_tab: ✅ Sign in / Create account buttons visible
frontend_test_details.tab_navigation: ✅ All tabs (Home, Shop, Cart, Wishlist, Profile) working
frontend_test_details.whatsapp_button: ✅ Visible on all screens (green FAB in bottom right)

fixes_applied: Fixed duplicate React keys warning in shop.tsx by changing keyExtractor from 'item.handle || all' to 'item.handle === '' ? 'filter-all' : item.handle'
